questions.q: Is there a MariNation mobile app?
questions.a: MariNation is fully optimized for mobile web browsers on iOS and Android. A dedicated native app is on our roadmap — follow us on social media to be the first to know when it launches.

questions.q: How do I report a bug or technical issue?
questions.a: You can report bugs by emailing support@marinationmusic.com or using the in-app feedback button. Please include a description of the issue, the device you're using, and any screenshots that might help us reproduce it.

questions.q: How do I contact MariNation support?
questions.a: Our support team is available via email at support@marinationmusic.com. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24–48 business hours. For urgent account or payment issues, please mark your email subject line as "URGENT."

questions.q: Where can I find MariNation's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy?
questions.a: Both documents are linked in the footer of every page on MariNation.com. We encourage all users to read them carefully before participating in any markets.
